text: A street scene in a city, likely Latin America, showing a row of multi-story buildings. On the left, a yellow building has a ground-floor shop with a closed metal shutter. Laundry hangs from the building. A man in a light shirt and dark pants walks on the sidewalk. In the center, a large red building features a prominent arched entranceway with a decorative canopy. To the right, a small, makeshift structure made of corrugated metal and covered with blue and green tarpaulin serves as a temporary dwelling or shelter. A circular traffic sign is visible near the makeshift structure. The street is paved, and shadows indicate bright sunlight.
